title: Stalwart (disambiguation)
content:
'''Stalwart''' could refer to several things:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''''[[Stalwart]]''''', an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]].

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*'''''[[Stalwart (Star Destroyer)|Stalwart]]''''', a [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] which participated at the [[Battle of Borosk (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Borosk]] in [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]].
*'''[[Stalwart (Majestic-class)|''Stalwart'']]''', a [[Majestic-class heavy cruiser|''Majestic''-class heavy cruiser]].
*'''[[Stalwart-class light freighter|''Stalwart''-class light freighter]]''', a class of [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]].
*'''''[[Stalwart (EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate)|Stalwart]]''''', a [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] used by [[Vocis Kenit]] in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]].
*'''''[[Stalwart (Victory-class)|Stalwart]]''''', a [[Victory I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory I''-class Star Destroyer]] used by [[Vice Admiral/Legends|Vice Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]].

{{Disambig}}
